name: Zero-Rate Tax for Non-NFA Firearm Making

eligibility.description: Applies to persons making firearms that do not meet the definition of a machinegun or destructive device under the National Firearms Act.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The tax rate for making a firearm that is not a machinegun or a destructive device is $0, effectively exempting these items from the standard $200 making tax.
